checks.description: Detect a 0→1→0 pulse on data_in and assert data_out=1 at the cycle when data_in returns to 0, then deassert.
checks.pass_condition: When a 0→1→0 transition on data_in occurs within any three consecutive clock cycles, data_out must be 1 in the same cycle that data_in returns to 0, and 0 otherwise. The oracle does not assume a fixed latency beyond the observed pattern; it only requires the externally visible relationship between the input pulse and the output assertion.
checks.trigger_condition: When a rising edge on data_in is observed followed by a falling edge within two subsequent clock cycles.
